# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    environment: production

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up environment variables
        run: |
          echo "CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND=$BUILD_COMMAND" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPT=$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run custom build script
        if: env.BUILD_COMMAND != ''
        run: |
          sh ${{ env.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND }}

      - name: Execute deployment commands
        if: env.DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPT != ''
        run: |
          sh ${env.DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPT}}
